guṇya a. [guṇ-yat]
1 Endowed with merits or virtues; guṇyaguṇya iti na vyajīgaṇat  Śi. 14. 47. 
2 To be enumerated.
3 To be described or praised.
4 To be multiplied, the multiplicand.
